base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their forties, of Sub-Saharan African descent, with short black hair and sharp hazel eyes, a soft smile. natural light from a side window. a softly lit gray studio backdrop. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A woman in her late 40s with rich, dark brown skin and a smooth complexion, featuring a few faint freckles across her nose and cheeks. Her face is a heart shape, with a slightly pointed chin and a delicate jawline. She has short, curly black hair, styled cropped close to her head, and a slightly receding hairline that enhances her broad forehead. Her eyes are large and round, set moderately apart, with warm hazel irises. Her eyebrows are thin and gently curved. Her nose is narrow with a pointed tip. Her lips are full with a subtle, undefined cupid's bow. She is seated at a wooden desk with a laptop open before her and a coffee cup to her side, looking up at the camera with a soft, closed-mouth smile. Three-quarter body shot, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
